Manufactured by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] tactician [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]],<ref name="db" /> '''Tala 1''' was a [[Z-95t Headhunter]] produced during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought by the Alliance against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="tala1" /> As with all other Z-95t Headhunters, Tala 1 had a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|class 3 hyperdrive]],<ref name="db stats" /> which was added to allow the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] to allow it to operate independently of [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] support.<ref name="tala1" /> In addition to the class 3 hyperdrive, the Z-95t Headhunter model also had increased maneuverability compared to the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]],<ref name="db Headhunter">{{DB|starship|z95headhunter|Z-95 Headhunter}}</ref> and Tala 1 was individually a heavily modified Headhunter.<ref name="tala1" />

By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Tala 1}} is set around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], the events of which are dated to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Tala 1 was serving in the Alliance's [[Tala Squadron]]. Operationally assigned to support [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] led by [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]],<ref name="tala1" /> an Alliance [[General/Legends|general]],<ref name="Return of the Jedi">{{Film|VI}}</ref> Tala 1 was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]], an Alliance [[Spy/Legends|spy]] and [[Scout/Legends|scout]]. Cracken often flew support missions for Madine's commando team.<ref name="cracken" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tala 1 was created in [[2000]] for the ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="tala1" />
